历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Guangxi's science (physics category) were approximately 30820 → 2394 → 17082 → 14341 → 12593. The abnormally low value in 2022 was due to data caliber differences during Guangxi's college entrance examination reform transition period; excluding that, the overall trend shows a continuous rise (ranking numbers decreasing). Over the past three years, it improved from 17082 to 12593, moving up by about 4489 places cumulatively. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12593. Xiamen University's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guangxi: 114 in 2021, 114 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 124 in 2024, 122 in 2025, and 105 planned for 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan reduces enrollment by 17 students (-13.9%), a relatively large reduction, which theoretically eases competition and may cause the ranking to move up.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 25th (26th in 2021 → 24th in 2025 → 25th in 2026), consistently in the top 25 nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' involving issues such as serious campus voyeurism, difficulty in employment for mathematics graduates, and discrimination against undergraduate backgrounds in re-examinations. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was 'somewhat negative,' with enrollment conditions worsening since 2017. Its Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of 10.6 million, indicating extremely high short video exposure. Negative reputation may suppress some students' willingness to apply, but high attention attracts many applicants, offsetting each other. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Xiamen University has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, and Ecology A, with 4 A+ disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Xiamen University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity (all rated 'highly recommended' in 2024). Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology also maintain 'recommended' popularity. In 2026, Guangxi's total number of college entrance exam takers is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 (+3.2%) from 2025 (about 380,000), with an estimated 269,000 physics category examinees, intensifying competition. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, a popular southeastern coastal region with strong cross-provincial appeal to Guangxi students. Its enrollment plan in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion (about 2%-3% of the total plan), making it a moderately sized 985 university for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12593, a 13.9% enrollment reduction in 2026, a 3.2% increase in Guangxi's total examinees intensifying competition, a somewhat negative reputation suppressing some application willingness, and high Douyin heat maintaining attention, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 science (physics category) is approximately 11600, with a ranking range of 11100–12100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is about 11600, with a range of 11100–12100. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 11500), target Tier 2 majors such as Engineering Experimental Class, Chemistry, and Economics. If your ranking is near the lower limit (around 12000), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and try for lower-ranked Tier 2 majors. Majors at the Malaysia Campus have lower ranking thresholds (about 7000–12600) and can serve as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Guangxi's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 5224, 413, 3535, 3447, and 3011 respectively. The abnormally low value in 2022 was due to data caliber differences during Guangxi's college entrance examination reform transition period. Excluding that, the overall trend shows a fluctuating upward movement (ranking numbers decreasing). In the past three years, the ranking improved from 3535 to 3011, a cumulative advance of about 524 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3011. Xiamen University's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Guangxi: 29 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 33 in 2025, and 21 planned for 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a significant reduction of 12 students (-36.4%). The substantial reduction theoretically eases competition significantly, leading to a notable advancement in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, with a stable Soft Science ranking of 24th to 26th nationally. It is a top-tier comprehensive university in China, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation is rated as 'clearly negative', involving campus safety, retest discrimination, and other issues. In 2025, its reputation was rated as 'somewhat negative', with enrollment conditions continuing to deteriorate. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of 10.6 million. Negative public opinion coexists with high exposure, creating a complex impact on application enthusiasm. Xiamen University has prominent advantages in liberal arts: Law A-, Education A, Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Sociology A-, Marxist Theory A-, Theoretical Economics A-, etc. Its comprehensive strength in liberal arts ranks among the top in the country, exerting a strong attraction for liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Law major is 'recommended' (differentiated wait-and-see in 2024), Accounting/Finance/Auditing is 'recommended', Chinese Language/Literature is 'recommended'. The estimated number of history category candidates in Guangxi for 2026 is about 123,000, an increase of about 4,000 (+3.3%) compared to 2025 (about 119,000), slightly intensifying competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, a popular city on the southeast coast, with strong cross-provincial appeal for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion, and with the significant reduction to 21 students in 2026, scarcity further increases.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3011, the significant 36.4% enrollment reduction in 2026, the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi history category candidates intensifying competition, the somewhat negative reputation suppressing some application willingness, and the high Douyin heat maintaining attention, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will be approximately 2384, with a ranking range of 1884 to 2884.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is approximately 2384, with a range of 1884 to 2884. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 1900) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors like Law, Accounting, and Economics. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 2400) can target Tier 2 majors such as Humanities Experimental Class and Sociology. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (around 2800) are advised to use Malaysia Campus majors as a safety net. With the significant reduction in liberal arts enrollment to only 21 students in 2026, the competition landscape has changed considerably, requiring more precise positioning in applications.
